technology.title: Mira Murati Wants Her AI to ‘Keep Humans in the Loop’
technology.summary: The Thinking Machines Lab founder and former CTO of OpenAI tells WIRED she isn’t interested in automating people out of jobs. Instead, she’s building AI that can collaborate.

briefing.news_focus: The Thinking Machines Lab founder and former CTO of OpenAI tells WIRED she isn’t interested in automating people out of jobs. Instead, she’s building AI that can collaborate.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Mira Murati，Thinking Machines Lab的創辦人及前OpenAI首席技術官，近日在接受《Wired》訪問時表示，她的目標是開發能與人類合作的人工智慧，而非取代人類工作。她強調，未來的AI應該能夠讓人類參與決策過程，保持人類在環境中的重要性。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的快速發展，許多專家和企業對於AI取代人類工作的擔憂日益增加。Murati的觀點反映了當前科技界對於AI應用的不同看法，尤其是在如何平衡自動化與人類勞動力之間的關係。許多企業正尋求將AI技術融入工作流程，以提高效率，但同時也面臨著如何保護員工的工作安全和職業發展的挑戰。
briefing.analysis: Murati的立場強調了AI發展中的一個重要議題：人類與機器之間的協作。她的觀點可能會受到那些擔心AI取代工作的專業人士的支持，因為這樣的合作模式可以減少失業風險並促進創新。然而，這也可能引發對於AI技術如何具體實現這種合作的質疑。其他科技領域的專家可能會持不同看法，認為自動化是不可避免的趨勢，並可能對人類工作產生深遠影響。因此，Murati的觀點在科技界內部可能會引發討論，並促使更廣泛的對話關於未來工作模式的設計。

technology.title: OpenAI explores legal options against Apple, source says - Reuters
technology.summary: OpenAI explores legal options against Apple, source says Reuters

briefing.news_focus: OpenAI explores legal options against Apple, source says Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: OpenAI 正在探索對 Apple 提起法律行動的選項，原因是其與 Apple 的 ChatGPT 整合未能達到預期的訂閱數和知名度。這一消息來自於 Reuters 的報導，顯示出 OpenAI 對於合作結果的不滿。
briefing.background: OpenAI 與 Apple 之間的合作關係原本被視為雙方在科技領域的一次重要結合，尤其是在人工智慧應用方面。然而，隨著市場對於 AI 產品的需求增長，OpenAI 期望透過與 Apple 的整合來提升其用戶基礎和品牌影響力。然而，根據 TechCrunch 的報導，這一整合未能如預期般成功，導致 OpenAI 感到失望，並考慮採取法律行動以維護其商業利益。
briefing.analysis: OpenAI 與 Apple 的關係顯示了科技公司之間合作的脆弱性，尤其是在期望未能實現時。OpenAI 對於未能吸引足夠的訂閱者感到不滿，這可能影響其未來的商業模式和市場策略。Apple 方面可能會強調其平台的穩定性和用戶基礎，並對 OpenAI 的法律行動表示反對，認為這是對合作夥伴關係的不當反應。隨著法律行動的可能性增加，雙方的商業關係可能會受到進一步影響，並可能引發其他科技公司對於合作條件的重新評估。

supporting_titles: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
supporting_summaries: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.

technology.title: Closing arguments begin in Elon Musk’s landmark lawsuit against OpenAI
technology.summary: Elon Musk accuses OpenAI of breaching charitable trust and prioritising profit over AI safety and nonprofit values.

briefing.news_focus: Elon Musk accuses OpenAI of breaching charitable trust and prioritising profit over AI safety and nonprofit values.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 埃隆·馬斯克對OpenAI提起的訴訟進入閉庭辯論階段，馬斯克指控OpenAI違反慈善信託，將利潤置於人工智慧安全和非營利價值之上。這場訴訟的陪審團將考慮OpenAI及其首席執行官山姆·奧特曼是否對馬斯克造成了不當得利。
briefing.background: 馬斯克與OpenAI之間的訴訟反映出科技行業內部的緊張關係，特別是在人工智慧的發展與商業化之間的矛盾。OpenAI最初成立時的宗旨是推動人工智慧的安全與公益，但隨著其商業模式的轉變，馬斯克認為其已偏離初衷。這場訴訟不僅涉及馬斯克的個人利益，也引發了對AI倫理與商業化的廣泛討論，特別是在矽谷這個科技創新的熱土上。
briefing.analysis: 在這場訴訟中，馬斯克的立場是OpenAI未能遵循其最初的慈善使命，並將利潤置於安全之上，這可能會影響整個AI行業的信任度。根據《衛報》的報導，陪審團將考慮OpenAI是否不當獲利，這顯示出訴訟的高風險性。另一方面，《The Verge》則指出，馬斯克的律師在閉庭辯論中出現口誤，這可能影響陪審團的印象。這場訴訟的結果將對OpenAI的未來運作及其在AI領域的聲譽產生深遠影響，並可能引發其他科技公司對其商業模式的反思。

supporting_titles: High-stakes courtroom drama of Musk v OpenAI hears closing arguments
supporting_summaries: Nine-person jury to consider whether AI firm bilked world’s richest person and unjustly enriched themselves Closing arguments began on Thursday in Elon Musk ’s lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI , bringing the weeks-long courtroom battle between the two tech moguls nearer to a decision. A nine-person jury is set to deliberate and return a verdict on whether they believe the AI firm and Altman are liable in the case. The trial, which began last month in an Oakland, California, federal courthouse, has gripped Silicon Valley and featured some of the tech industry’s biggest names as witnesses. Attorneys for both sides have presented testimony and documents that have exposed Musk and Altman’s private dealings, as well as provided a window into the contentious history of OpenAI. Continue reading...

Today was closing arguments in the Musk v. Altman trial, and I almost feel bad writing about the unbelievable demolition derby I just witnessed. Steven Molo, Musk's lawyer, stumbled over his words. He at one point called Greg Brockman - a co-defendant - Greg Altman. He erroneously claimed that Musk wasn't asking for money and […]

politics.title: Xi-Trump summit aside, 2 meetings in Asia matter for global trade
politics.summary: Most readers of foreign news pages this weekend will be assuming that US President Donald Trump’s summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing has been dominating everyone’s attention. But across Asia, Trump, with his massive business entourage, was not the only act in town this week. At least two other major sets of meetings should not be overlooked. First, in New Delhi, Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi was hosting foreign ministers from the 10 Brics economies and a growing community...

briefing.news_focus: Most readers of foreign news pages this weekend will be assuming that US President Donald Trump’s summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing has been dominating everyone’s attention. But across Asia, Trump, with his massive business entourage, was not the only act in town this week. At least two other major sets of meetings should not be overlooked. First, in New Delhi, Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi was hosting foreign ministers from the 10 Brics economies and a growing community...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普與中國國家主席習近平的峰會在北京舉行，但亞洲其他地區也有重要會議進行。印度總理莫迪在新德里接待了來自10個金磚國家的外長，這些會議對全球貿易同樣具有重要意義。這顯示出在特朗普的商業代表團訪問期間，亞洲其他國家的外交活動仍然值得關注。
briefing.background: 此次會議背景涉及全球貿易的多元化與各國間的經濟合作。金磚國家（巴西、俄羅斯、印度、中國和南非）在全球經濟中扮演著日益重要的角色，尤其是在面對美國主導的貿易政策時。印度作為金磚國家的一部分，致力於加強與這些國家的外交與經濟聯繫，並在全球貿易中尋求更大的影響力。此外，特朗普與習近平的會議也將重點討論貿易與投資問題，反映出中美之間的經濟互賴性。
briefing.analysis: 此次峰會的舉行反映出中美兩國在全球貿易中的重要地位，然而，印度與金磚國家的會議則顯示出其他經濟體在尋求自主發展的努力。特朗普的訪問強調了美國企業對中國技術的依賴，特別是在電動車產業中，這一點在參考報導中得到了補充，提到福特在美國密歇根州的電池廠即將啟用，顯示出全球汽車製造商對中國技術的需求。不同報導的重點在於，主新聞強調了亞洲其他會議的重要性，而參考報導則聚焦於中美峰會的具體經濟影響，顯示出各方在全球貿易格局中的不同立場與策略。

supporting_titles: Xi-Trump summit: Ford-CATL battery plant shows how global carmakers need China’s prowess
supporting_summaries: The upcoming meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Xi will be followed by a Putin-Xi summit. Will there be scope for triangular diplomacy?

A Ford Motor electric vehicle (EV) battery plant in the US state of Michigan, edging closer to inauguration, has shed light on global marques’ reliance on Chinese technologies to accelerate their EV transition amid US President Donald Trump’s state visit to Beijing. With trade and investment among the top issues on the agenda for the summit between Trump and President Xi Jinping, the US$3 billion facility, with a capacity of more than 400,000 EVs a year, has heightened expectations for similar...

politics.title: Israel-Iran war highlights: Iran allows Chinese ships to pass Hormuz since May 13, reports Iranian media
politics.summary: “The UAE is an active partner in this aggression, and there is no doubt about it; It also became clear that they participated in these attacks and may have even acted directly against us” says Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi

briefing.news_focus: “The UAE is an active partner in this aggression, and there is no doubt about it; It also became clear that they participated in these attacks and may have even acted directly against us” says Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗外長阿拉赫奇表示，自5月13日起，伊朗允許中國船隻通過霍爾木茲海峽，並指責阿聯酋參與對伊朗的攻擊行動。他強調，阿聯酋在這場衝突中扮演了積極的角色，甚至可能直接參與攻擊。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，伊朗與阿聯酋之間的緊張關係持續升級，特別是在地區安全與海上貿易方面。伊朗對於外國軍艦的進入持有高度警覺，並要求進入該海峽的船隻必須與伊朗海軍合作。近期，報導指出一艘船隻在阿聯酋港口附近被“未經授權的人員”扣押，這進一步加劇了地區緊張局勢。
briefing.analysis: 伊朗與阿聯酋之間的矛盾加劇，反映出兩國在地緣政治上的深層次對立。伊朗指責阿聯酋參與對其的攻擊，這可能使得雙方的軍事對抗升級。根據參考報導，阿拉赫奇強調進入霍爾木茲海峽的船隻必須與伊朗海軍合作，這顯示出伊朗希望加強對該海域的控制。另一方面，阿聯酋則可能因為其與美國及其他盟友的關係而面臨更大的壓力。隨著中國船隻的通行，可能會影響到地區的軍事平衡，並引發其他國家的關注與介入。

supporting_titles: Iran says ships entering strait of Hormuz must cooperate after vessel seized
supporting_summaries: Docked ship reportedly seized outside UAE port by “unauthorised personnel” The Iranian foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi, has said ships entering the strait of Hormuz must cooperate with the Iranian navy as reports emerged of a ship being seized outside a United Arab Emirate port and taken towards Iranian waters. The UK Maritime Trading Organisation said the docked ship was seized by “unauthorised personnel” while it was anchored off the coast of the United Arab Emirates port of Fujairah near the southern entry to the strait of Hormuz. Continue reading...

politics.title: 13 men killed by US military boat strikes identified: ‘These were flesh-and-blood people’
politics.summary: All victims of US strikes in eastern Pacific and the Caribbean identified so far came from extremely poor communities Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email A five-month investigation has named 13 previously unidentified victims of US attacks on boats allegedly carrying narcotics in a campaign that has killed nearly 200 people in the Caribbean and the eastern Pacific. It is unclear if the US has ever identified any of its 194 victims before attacking them, and the names of just three had previously emerged, after their families launched legal cases against the White House. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: All victims of US strikes in eastern Pacific and the Caribbean identified so far came from extremely poor communities Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email A five-month investigation has named 13 previously unidentified victims of US attacks on boats allegedly carrying narcotics in a campaign that has killed nearly 200 people in the Caribbean and the eastern Pacific. It is unclear if the US has ever identified any of its 194 victims before attacking them, and the names of just three had previously emerged, after their families launched legal cases against the White House. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國軍方在東太平洋和加勒比海的攻擊行動中，已確認13名受害者的身份，這些人來自極度貧困的社區。這項為期五個月的調查顯示，這些攻擊針對涉嫌運載毒品的船隻，至今已造成近200人死亡。目前尚不清楚美國在攻擊前是否曾識別過這194名受害者的身份，已知的僅有三名受害者是在其家屬對白宮提起法律訴訟後曝光的。
briefing.background: 美國在加勒比海及東太平洋的軍事行動主要是針對毒品走私活動，這些行動常常引發國際社會對其合法性及人道影響的質疑。近年來，隨著毒品走私問題的加劇，美國加強了對該地區的軍事打擊，以期減少毒品流入美國本土。然而，這些行動的結果卻導致大量平民傷亡，並引發了對美國軍事行動透明度及倫理的廣泛討論。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件揭示了美國在打擊毒品走私過程中，可能忽視了對平民生命的尊重與保護。受害者來自貧困社區，這引發了對美國軍事行動對當地社會影響的關注。調查結果表明，美國在進行攻擊前未必進行充分的身份識別，這可能導致無辜平民的死亡。各方對此事件的反應可能會影響美國未來的軍事策略及國際形象，尤其是在需要獲得國際支持的情況下。隨著更多受害者身份的曝光，社會對美國軍事行動的合法性及道德責任的討論將愈加激烈。

economy.title: Chinese margin traders raise wagers to record high as tech stock rally in full swing
economy.summary: China’s stock investors boosted their leveraged bets to an all-time high, helping fuel a record-setting run on technology stocks amid easing geopolitical tensions and earnings resilience. The outstanding value of margin trading on the mainland’s exchanges reached 2.86 trillion yuan (US$420.8 billion) on Thursday, rising to a record for a seventh straight day, according to the data by China Securities Finance. Leveraged traders poured the borrowed funds mainly into electronics, semiconductor and...

briefing.news_focus: China’s stock investors boosted their leveraged bets to an all-time high, helping fuel a record-setting run on technology stocks amid easing geopolitical tensions and earnings resilience. The outstanding value of margin trading on the mainland’s exchanges reached 2.86 trillion yuan (US$420.8 billion) on Thursday, rising to a record for a seventh straight day, according to the data by China Securities Finance. Leveraged traders poured the borrowed funds mainly into electronics, semiconductor and...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國股市投資者的保證金交易額達到歷史新高，促使科技股的漲勢持續。根據中國證券金融公司的數據，截至週四，中國內地交易所的保證金交易未償還價值達到2.86萬億元人民幣（約4208億美元），這是連續第七天創下新紀錄。投資者主要將借來的資金投入電子、半導體等行業，這一現象與地緣政治緊張局勢的緩解及企業盈利的韌性有關。
briefing.background: 近期，中國股市因地緣政治緊張局勢的緩解而受到提振，特別是在科技領域。隨著全球對科技股的需求上升，投資者對中國科技公司的前景持樂觀態度。此外，中國政府對科技產業的支持政策也在一定程度上促進了市場信心。保證金交易的增加反映了投資者對市場的信心及對科技股的強烈興趣，這在一定程度上也表明了市場流動性的增加。
briefing.analysis: 隨著保證金交易額的上升，市場的風險也隨之增加。投資者在追求高回報的同時，可能面臨更大的市場波動風險。科技股的強勁表現吸引了大量資金流入，但若市場情況發生變化，這些高槓桿的投資者可能會遭受重大損失。此外，市場的這一動態也可能引起監管機構的關注，因為過度的槓桿交易可能會導致市場不穩定。未來，若科技股持續上漲，則可能會進一步吸引更多的投資者進入市場，反之則可能引發拋售潮。

economy.title: Jaguar Land Rover annual profit falls 99% after US tariffs and cyber-attack take toll
economy.summary: Britain’s largest carmaker says sales also hit by competition in China as it publishes financial results Business live – latest updates Jaguar Land Rover’s annual profits have slumped by more than 99% as it counted the cost of US tariffs and a cyber-attack that disrupted its factories for months. Britain’s largest carmaker made only £14m in profit before tax and exceptional items in the year to March, down from £2.5bn the year before, according to financial results published on Thursday. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Britain’s largest carmaker says sales also hit by competition in China as it publishes financial results Business live – latest updates Jaguar Land Rover’s annual profits have slumped by more than 99% as it counted the cost of US tariffs and a cyber-attack that disrupted its factories for months. Britain’s largest carmaker made only £14m in profit before tax and exceptional items in the year to March, down from £2.5bn the year before, according to financial results published on Thursday. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國最大的汽車製造商捷豹路虎（Jaguar Land Rover）公布其年度財報，顯示在截至三月的財年中，利潤驟降超過99%，僅錄得1400萬英鎊的稅前利潤，遠低於前年的25億英鎊。這一劇烈下滑主要受到美國關稅及網絡攻擊的影響，後者導致工廠運作受到數月的干擾。此外，該公司在中國市場的競爭也對銷售造成壓力。
briefing.background: 捷豹路虎作為英國最大的汽車製造商，面臨著多重挑戰。美國對進口汽車徵收的高額關稅使得其在美國市場的競爭力下降，而網絡攻擊則直接影響了其生產能力，造成了顯著的經濟損失。隨著中國市場競爭的加劇，捷豹路虎的銷售也受到影響，這使得其在全球汽車市場的地位愈加脆弱。這些因素共同導致了公司利潤的急劇下降，顯示出當前汽車產業面臨的困境。
briefing.analysis: 捷豹路虎的利潤大幅下降反映出其在全球汽車市場中的脆弱性，尤其是在面對外部挑戰時。美國的關稅政策使得進口汽車的成本上升，進一步削弱了捷豹路虎在美國市場的競爭力。此外，網絡攻擊的影響不僅限於短期的生產中斷，還可能對品牌形象和消費者信任造成長期損害。面對中國市場的激烈競爭，捷豹路虎需要重新評估其市場策略，以應對不斷變化的消費者需求和競爭環境。未來，若無法有效應對這些挑戰，捷豹路虎可能會面臨更大的財務壓力和市場份額的流失。

economy.title: Chinese EV makers hunt for idled plants in Europe as they expand global influence
economy.summary: Chinese electric vehicle (EV) makers, from BYD to Leapmotor, are voraciously seeking out manufacturing assets in Europe as the global energy crisis creates surging demand for battery-powered vehicles. Their pursuit of idled European assembly facilities owned by big names like Stellantis and Volkswagen is disrupting the pecking order in the global automotive industry, as the Chinese carmakers’ design and manufacturing heft sees them morph into international players. “China’s EV assemblers are...

briefing.news_focus: Chinese electric vehicle (EV) makers, from BYD to Leapmotor, are voraciously seeking out manufacturing assets in Europe as the global energy crisis creates surging demand for battery-powered vehicles. Their pursuit of idled European assembly facilities owned by big names like Stellantis and Volkswagen is disrupting the pecking order in the global automotive industry, as the Chinese carmakers’ design and manufacturing heft sees them morph into international players. “China’s EV assemblers are...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國電動車製造商，如比亞迪和零跑，正在積極尋找歐洲的閒置製造設施，以擴大其全球影響力。隨著全球能源危機推動對電池動力車的需求激增，這些中國汽車製造商的行動正在打亂全球汽車產業的格局，因為它們的設計和製造實力使其逐漸轉型為國際參與者。
briefing.background: 近年來，隨著環保意識的提升和政府政策的支持，電動車市場在全球範圍內快速增長。特別是在歐洲，為了達成減碳目標，各國政府積極推動電動車的普及，這使得電動車的需求大幅上升。此外，許多傳統汽車製造商面臨轉型壓力，部分工廠因產能過剩而閒置，這為中國電動車製造商提供了收購或租用的機會，進一步加速了其國際化進程。
briefing.analysis: 中國電動車製造商的擴張行為可能會引發歐洲汽車產業的重組，特別是對於傳統汽車製造商如斯太爾和大眾等。這些公司可能會面臨更大的競爭壓力，因為中國品牌不僅在價格上具有優勢，還在技術和設計上逐漸追趕。另一方面，這也可能促使歐洲企業加速技術創新和轉型，以應對來自中國的挑戰。隨著中國電動車製造商的影響力增強，未來可能會出現更多的合作或競爭關係，進一步改變全球汽車市場的格局。
